name: GATE-E — Client Comms Approval (AUTO-017)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "workflow": "GATE-E",
  "action_type": "client_communication",
  "target_system": "{{ $json.channel || 'email' }}",
  "target_id": "{{ $json.recipient_email || $json.recipient }}",
  "target_description": "Client comms to {{ $json.recipient }} re: {{ $json.subject }}",
  "proposed_payload": {
    "to": "{{ $json.recipient }}",
    "subject": "{{ $json.subject }}",
    "body_preview": "{{ ($json.body || '').substring(0, 200) }}",
    "channel": "{{ $json.channel || 'email' }}"
  },
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason || 'AI-generated client communication pending review' }}",
  "project_id": {{ $json.project_id || 'null' }},
  "actor": "{{ $json.actor || 'system' }}",
  "priority": "high"
}

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "queued", "queue_id": {{ $('Enqueue in Approval Queue').first().json.queue_id }}, "message": "Client communication queued for Buck approval — not sent" }

_hci_notes: Gate E — blocks ANY AI-generated client-facing communication. POST body: { recipient, subject, body, channel, project_id, reason }. Always queues, never sends. Buck reviews at /executive. High priority push — client comms are never auto-sent.
